catch me if u can
Did you know? There's a holiday tomorrow. It's アースデイ. A day that reminds you to go "大事にする" your "環境." And cut down on the "汚染."
Wait, what do these words mean?
Oh, you'll know them in just a minute! Just access this word list — Green Vocabulary for Earth Day.
相信大家呢幾日都感受到，天氣開始炎熱！行商場絕對係夏天嘅不二之選！
Learn Words Fast with Science-Backed Spaced Repetition Flashcards

How does it all work? Well, back in 1885, a German psychologist, Hermann Ebbinghaus, came up with the “forgetting curve.” This graph pinpoints when we start forgetting, and when we need to be reminded so we don’t forget. Long story short: You need to review over “spaced” periods of time.
And so, “Spaced Repetition” learning was born.
So, the best way to learn words is with Spaced Repetition Flashcards.
They’re like a persistent teacher that refuses to let you fail. The Flashcards quiz you so you never forget. And best of all… there’s a New Update!

You can now easily use Flashcards on any device: They’re now mobile-responsive and can fit any screen: any iPhone, iPad, Android or computer. Visit the website and access “Flashcards” in the Vocabulary drop-down menu.

識唔識marker上色
Most companies as giving minimal attention to external risks. Are you giving enough attention to what your competitors are doing? What about other changes going on around you?

Too many organizations fall into this trap. It's easy to think that internal decisions and actions fully account for the company's results. But this is a fallacy. Good strategic planners will spend a great deal of time, energy and focus on external forces.

replies.msg:
知名記者Brandon Davis在推特寫下「『復仇者聯盟：終局之戰』是一部讓人驚訝的電影，我從來沒看過這樣的東西，這部電影比你想像的一切都還要更為驚人。」知名影評網站「爛番茄」的編輯僅簡短在推特上表示「我不能爆雷，這會是一部讓粉絲們全瘋了的電影」而「Slashfilm」的記者Peter Sciretta則在推特表示他看這片時哭了至少五到六次，「我已經把『復仇者聯盟：終局之戰』設想得很完美，但不知為何，這部電影還是超乎了我的預期」。

仲有18個鐘就輪到我睇
